item.title: 对话代理的多维评估可操作化：具有选择性重新评估和模型基准测试的可扩展、受管理的管道
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12085v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Evaluating retail conversational agents requires methods beyond lexical-overlap metrics to assess intent alignment, factuality, helpfulness, clarity, tone, and overall response quality.
